Discerning Between Wisdoms

Kingdom Finance Principles: Wisdom, The Foundation of Wealth

In the order of divine providence, there is a divine pattern that must never be inverted: wisdom precedes wealth.

Marriage Series: No Place for Pride

Effective Service: What Is Your Part?

Standing Steadfast in Our Freedom

To stand fast in freedom is to refuse every doctrine that attempts to diminish the finished work of Christ. It

Showing The Exceeding Riches Of His Grace

Kingdom Finance Principles: Respect Small Beginnings
